title: How to qualify to prescribe or supply animal medicines
body: "An SQP is a category of professionally qualified persons who are entitled to prescribe and/or supply certain veterinary medicinal products.  Information covered includes:   the categories of medicine that an SQP can prescribe and/or supply the different types of SQP  what a qualified veterinary nurse needs to do to become an SQP to prescribe or supply veterinary medicines what others need to do to become an SQP    "
